title: Bitdeer Technologies Group Bitcoin Treasury Holdings
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ: BTDR), headquartered in Singapore, currently maintains zero Bitcoin holdings on its corporate balance sheet despite being a leading publicly traded Bitcoin mining company operating a global network of mining data centers. The company provides both self-mining and cloud mining services but has chosen not to accumulate Bitcoin as corporate treasury reserves. Bitdeer started 2026 with approximately 2,000 BTC but systematically liquidated its entire Bitcoin treasury by mid-February 2026. The company sold 189.8 BTC produced during the period plus 943.1 BTC from existing reserves. Company leadership indicated the decision reflects liquidity management needs rather than loss of confidence in Bitcoin. The liquidation funded $300 million in convertible notes offering and capital expenditures for data center expansion, AI cloud growth, and mining hardware purchases. CEO Jihan Wu stated that zero-Bitcoin balance does not necessarily mean permanent liquidation, suggesting Bitdeer may resume Bitcoin accumulation when capital needs stabilize. The decision to prioritize capital deployment over treasury accumulation reflects Bitdeer's growth stage focus.
